HGSS.349.0000:
Cycling Road starts here.
It’s all downhill, so it’s totally\r
exhilarating.\f
Some people prefer convenient and cool
transportation such as the Fast Ship\r
and the Magnet Train.\r
You prefer the Bicycle, don’t you?
HGSS.349.0001:
You! Stop right there!\f
You have to be on a Bicycle to go on
the Cycling Road!\f
